sentence: PackageAR Privacy Policy
This app is aimed at those over the age of 13. Therefore, children under the age of 13 may only use PackageAR with parent/guardian supervision.
McNutt & Partners, LLC (“McNutt & Partners”, “McP”, “we”, “us”) is located at: 1661 Shug Jordan Pkwy, Ste 501
McNutt & Partners, LLC (“McNutt & Partners”, “McP”, “we”, “us”) is located at: Auburn, AL 36830

It is our policy to respect your privacy regarding any information we may collect while operating our mobile and web apps. This Privacy Policy applies to the PackageAR app (“PackageAR”, “App”). We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting personally identifiable information you may provide us through the app, if any. We have adopted this privacy policy (“Privacy Policy”) to explain what information may be collected through the app, how we use this information, and under what circumstances we may disclose the information to third parties. This Privacy Policy applies only to information we collect through App and does not apply to our collection of information from other sources.

This Privacy Policy sets forth the general rules and policies governing your use of the App. Depending on your activities when using App, you may be required to agree to additional terms and conditions.
App Store and Analytics Data

App stores, such as Google Play, the Apple App Store, the Amazon Appstore, and others, may collect aggregated, non-personally-identifying information on the App’s users, including statistics about installations and uninstallations. McP does not control or direct the collection of this information; please review your app store’s privacy policy for further information.
Learn more about how Google uses data when you use the App
Image Recognition and Geolocation Features

At this time, PackageAR does not use geolocation to provide Augmented Reality experiences. Should such features be enabled, they will be listed in the changelog of the app. Both images and geolocation data (should such features ever be enabled) are only collected while on the viewer screen (after tapping View Now), and do not continue to be collected after tapping Exit Viewer. Images and/or geolocation data are collected solely to facilitate the Augmented Reality experience, and are not retained or stored on your device or by any third party.
Using PackageAR
By using PackageAR, you acknowledge that anonymous statistical data on how you use the app will be collected and transmitted, and consent to this collection.
Security

The security of your Personal Information is important to us, but remember that no method of transmission over the Internet, or method of electronic storage is 100% secure. While we strive to use commercially acceptable means to protect your Personal Information, we cannot guarantee its absolute security.
Developer
PackageAR is developed and maintained by McNutt & Partners, LLC. You may contact the developer with questions or concerns about the app, including data usage, by emailing info@mcnuttpartners.com.
Governing Law and Changes

This policy shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Alabama. Although most changes are likely to be minor, AU may change this Privacy Policy from time to time, and in McP’s sole discretion. McP encourages visitors to frequently check this page for any changes to its Privacy Policy. Your continued use of App after any change in this Privacy Policy will constitute your acceptance of such change. The latest version of this policy, including any changes, can always be found at https://www.packagear.net/privacy-policy/.
Updated August 2020
